ques: Find a one-way flight from Prague to a city in Japan on July 20, 2026, which city in Japan is cheaper to go to, Tokyo or a certain city in Hokkaido?
answer: Tokyo is cheaper. A one-way Prague→Tokyo flight on July 20, 2026 starts at about €590, while the cheapest Prague→Sapporo (Hokkaido) flight is about €1139 — so Tokyo is the cheaper Japanese destination.
